bird.name: Red-rumped cacique
bird.summary: The red-rumped cacique (Cacicus haemorrhous) is a species of bird in the family Icteridae. It is a species of the Amazon Basin and the Guya…

locations.name: 法屬圭亞那
locations.summary: 法屬圭亞那（法語：Guyane française），正式名称为圭亚那（Guyane，法語發音：[ɡɥijan] ；法屬圭亞那克里奧爾語：Lagwiyann），是法国的一个海外省与单一领土集体，位于南美洲北部大西洋畔，与巴西和苏里南交界，…

relations.subject: Red-rumped cacique
relations.evidence: It is also found in Bolivia, Brazil, Colombia, Ecuador, French Guiana, Guyana, Peru, Suriname, and Venezuela. The red-rumped cacique's natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests, subtropical or tropical swamps, and heavily degraded former forest

relations.object_summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。
